message:
feat(python): numpy.size wrapper parity (franken_numpy-k9r2)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.size(a, axis=None), exposed
as size_count to avoid a name collision with std::mem::size_of.
Module presence assertion verifies registration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
